creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Try setting these undocumented tunables:

teken.fg_color
teken.bg_color

It appears this is not an issue with vt, but rather an issue with the loader always setting these to provide a white-on-black console.

See commits:

3001e0c942d80 
233ab015c0d73
a536ed419e6ab
